remaining_gap: MoSPI Statement 5.1 is machine-readable and supports exact category aggregation plus an explicit narcotics exclusion. MoSPI methodology defines PFCE as expenditure of households and NPISH combined and states that the two are not separately available. The table reports fiscal year 2021-22 rather than calendar year 2021. It is therefore not admissible to the strict S14/P31DC Armilar 2021 exact matrix.
